TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjudjaas, title = Tjudjaas, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjudjaas} }

S.FORM: alang Tjudjaas ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 40 buwan, 119 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . rhzyal kki'an lingay na Tjudjaas ga Gadu ru Kinilukuljan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjudjaas ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjudjaas ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 40 buwan, 119 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 112 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, . rhzyal kki'an lingay na Tjudjaas ga Gadu ru Kinilukuljan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjudjaas ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tju*jaas~ɕ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu kiŋβoŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, . rħzjal kkiʔan liŋaj na tju*jaas~ɕ ɣa ɣa*u ru kinilukuljan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tju*jaas~ɕ ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
